name: merchant_id
description: UltraCart merchant ID owning this order

name: order_id
description: Order ID

name: current_stage
description: Current stage that the order is in.

name: creation_dts
description: Date/time that the order was created

name: reject_dts
description: If the order was rejected, the date/time that the rejection occurred

name: currency_code
description: Currency code that the customer used if different than the merchant's base currency code

name: exchange_rate
description: Exchange rate at the time the order was placed if currency code is different than the base currency

name: refund_dts
description: If the order was refunded, the date/time that the last refund occurred

name: language_iso_code
description: Three letter ISO-639 language code used by the customer during the checkout if different than the default language

name: billing
description: Billing

fields.name: state_region
fields.description: State for United States otherwise region or province for other countries

fields.name: cc_emails
fields.description: CC emails.  Multiple allowed, but total length of all emails can not exceed 100 characters.

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: day_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Day time phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: evening_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Evening phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: cell_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Cell phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

name: shipping
description: Shipping

fields.name: shipping_date
fields.description: Date/time the order shipped on.  This date is set once the first shipment is sent to the customer.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Total weight of the items on the order

fields.name: ship_to_residential
fields.description: True if the shipping address is residential.  Effects the methods that are available to the customer as well as the price of the shipping method.

fields.name: delivery_date
fields.description: Date the customer is requesting delivery on.  Typically used for perishable product delivery.

fields.name: special_instructions
fields.description: Special instructions from the customer regarding shipping

fields.name: event_dts
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp that the event occurred

fields.name: event_timezone_id
fields.description: Timezone the event occurred in.  Use this in conjunction with event_dts to format a local date/time.

fields.name: ship_on_date
fields.description: Date the customer is requesting that the order ship on.  Typically used for perishable product delivery.

fields.name: lift_gate
fields.description: Lift gate requested (LTL shipping methods only)

fields.name: least_cost_route
fields.description: If true, instructs UltraCart to apply the cheapest shipping method to this order.  Used only for channel partner order inserts.

fields.name: least_cost_route_shipping_methods
fields.description: List of shipping methods to consider if least_code_route is true. Used only for channel parter order inserts.

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: day_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Day time phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: evening_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Evening phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: pickup_dts
fields.description: Date/time the order should be picked up locally.

name: taxes
description: Taxes

fields.name: tax_county
fields.description: County used for tax calculation purposes (only in the United States)

fields.name: tax_rate
fields.description: Tax rate, this is meaningless for updating an order.  For inserting a new order, if you need to override internal tax calculations, use the arbitrary fields.

fields.name: tax_rate_country
fields.description: Tax rate at the country level

fields.name: tax_rate_state
fields.description: Tax rate at the state level

fields.name: tax_rate_county
fields.description: Tax rate at the county level

fields.name: tax_rate_city
fields.description: Tax rate at the city level

fields.name: tax_rate_postal_code
fields.description: Tax rate at the postal code level

fields.name: tax_gift_charge
fields.description: True if gift charge is taxed

fields.name: arbitrary_tax
fields.description: Arbitrary Tax, this is meaningless for updating an order.  For inserting a new order, this will override any internal tax calculations and should only be used for orders completed outside the system.

fields.name: arbitrary_taxable_subtotal
fields.description: Arbitrary taxable subtotal, this is meaningless for updating an order.  For inserting a new order, this will override any internal tax calculations and should only be used for orders completed outside the system.

fields.name: arbitrary_tax_rate
fields.description: Arbitrary tax rate, this is meaningless for updating an order.  For inserting a new order, this will override any internal tax calculations and should only be used for orders completed outside the system.

name: payment
description: Payment

fields.name: surcharge
fields.description: Surcharge amount calculated from surcharge_transaction_fee and surcharge_transaction_percentage

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: test_order
fields.description: True if this is a test order

fields.name: rotating_transaction_gateway_code
fields.description: Rotating transaction gateway code used to process this order

fields.name: hold_for_fraud_review
fields.description: True if order has been held for fraud review

fields.name: card_number_token
fields.description: Card number token from hosted fields used to update the card number

fields.name: card_number_truncated
fields.description: True if the card has been truncated

fields.name: card_verification_number_token
fields.description: Card verification number token from hosted fields, only for import/insert of new orders, completely ignored for updates, and always null/empty for queries

fields.name: dual_vaulted
fields.description: Details on the dual vaulted card that is also stored at the payment processor for future reuse

fields.name: payment_dts
fields.description: Date/time that the payment was successfully processed, for new orders, this field is only considered if channel_partner.skip_payment_processing is true

fields.name: transactions
fields.description: Transactions associated with processing this payment

fields.name: successful
fields.description: True if the transaction was successful

fields.name: health_benefit_card_number
fields.description: Health benefit card number (masked to last 4)

fields.name: health_benefit_card_number_token
fields.description: Health benefit card number token from hosted fields used to update the health benefit card number

fields.name: health_benefit_card_number_truncated
fields.description: True if the health benefit card has been truncated

fields.name: health_benefit_card_expiration_year
fields.description: Health benefit card expiration year (Four digit year)

fields.name: health_benefit_card_verification_number_token
fields.description: Health benefit card verification number token from hosted fields, only for import/insert of new orders, completely ignored for updates, and always null/empty for queries

fields.name: paypal
fields.description: PayPal details if the payment was vaulted.

name: edi
description: EDI related information (only for orders received via EDI channel partner)

fields.name: edi_internal_vendor_number
fields.description: Internal vendor number associated with this EDI order

fields.name: edi_department
fields.description: Department number associated with this EDI order

fields.name: bill_to_edi_code
fields.description: Billing address identification code from the EDI order.  Typically DUNS or DUNS+4

fields.name: ship_to_edi_code
fields.description: Shipping address identification code from the EDI order.  Typically DUNS or DUNS+4

name: gift
description: Gift giving information

fields.name: gift
fields.description: True if the order is a gift

fields.name: gift_charge
fields.description: Charge associated with making this order a gift

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: gift_wrap_title
fields.description: Title of the gift wrap that the customer wants used

fields.name: gift_wrap_cost
fields.description: Cost of the gift wrap the customer selected

fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: gift_charge_accounting_code
fields.description: QuickBooks code for the gift charge

fields.name: gift_wrap_accounting_code
fields.description: QuickBooks code for the gift wrap charge

fields.name: gift_charge_refunded
fields.description: Amount refunded of the gift charge (read only except refund operation)

fields.name: currency_code

fields.name: gift_email

name: internal
description: Internal

fields.name: merchant_notes
fields.description: Merchant notes.  Full notes in non-transactional mode.  Just used to write a new merchant note when transaction merchant notes enabled.

fields.name: placed_by_user
fields.description: If placed via the BEOE, this is the user that placed the order

fields.name: exported_to_accounting
fields.description: True if the order has been exported to QuickBooks. If QuickBooks is not configured, then this will already be true

fields.name: sales_rep_code
fields.description: Sales rep code associated with the order

fields.name: user
fields.description: User that wrote the merchant note

fields.name: note_dts
fields.description: Timestamp when the note was added

name: marketing
description: Marketing

fields.name: mailing_list
fields.description: True if the customer has opted into mailing list subscription

fields.name: cell_phone_opt_in
fields.description: True if the customer has opted into SMS marketing

name: digital_order
description: Digital order details

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL where the customer can go to and download their digital order content

fields.name: creation_dts
fields.description: Date/time that the digital order was created

fields.name: expiration_dts
fields.description: Expiration date/time of the digital order

fields.name: items
fields.description: Digital items associated with the digital order

fields.name: product_code
fields.description: Item id associated with this item

fields.name: product_description
fields.description: Item description associated with this item

fields.name: last_download_ip_address
fields.description: IP address that performed the last download

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL that the customer can click to download the specific digital item

fields.name: url_id
fields.description: URL ID is a unique code that is part of the URLs

name: items
description: Items

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: tax_free
fields.description: True if the item is tax free

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: True if the item receives free shipping

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: item_reference_oid
fields.description: Item reference object identifier used to linked to auto order item record

fields.name: cost_change
fields.description: The amount that this option changes the cost

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: weight_change
fields.description: The amount that this option changes the weight

fields.name: additional_dimension_application
fields.description: How the additional dimensions are applied to the item.

fields.name: one_time_fee
fields.description: True if the cost associated with this option is a one time fee or multiplied by the quantity of the item

fields.name: file_attachment
fields.description: File attachment if option_type is file and attachment has not expired.

fields.name: hidden
fields.description: True if this option is hidden from display on the order

fields.name: no_shipping_discount
fields.description: True if this item is excluded from shipping discounts

fields.name: ship_separately
fields.description: True if this item ships in a separate box

fields.name: mix_and_match_group_oid
fields.description: Mix and match group object identifier

fields.name: distribution_center_code
fields.description: Distribution center code responsible for shipping this item

fields.name: kit
fields.description: True if this item is a kit

fields.name: kit_component
fields.description: True if this item is a kit component

fields.name: transmitted_to_distribution_center_dts
fields.description: Date/time that this item was transmitted to the distribution center

fields.name: shipped_dts
fields.description: Date/time that this item was marked shipped

fields.name: max_days_time_in_transit
fields.description: Maximum days that the item can be in transit before spoilage (perishable products)

fields.name: channel_partner_item_id
fields.description: Channel partner item id if this order came through a channel partner and the channel partner item id was mapped to an internal item id

fields.name: pricing_tier_name
fields.description: Pricing tier that granted the particular price for this item if the customer profile had pricing tiers assigned

fields.name: upsell
fields.description: True if this item was added to the order as part of an upsell

fields.name: quantity_refunded
fields.description: Quantity refunded on this item (read only except refund operation)

fields.name: total_refunded
fields.description: Total refunded on this item (read only except refund operation)

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: exclude_coupon
fields.description: True if this item is excluded from coupons

fields.name: activation_codes
fields.description: Activation codes assigned to this item

fields.name: identifications
fields.description: Identification information receives on the EDI purchase order

fields.name: taxable_cost
fields.description: The taxable cost of the item.  Typically the same as the cost

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: arbitrary_unit_cost
fields.description: Arbitrary unit cost, used only during inserts for overriding the unit cost of an item

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: auto_order_schedule
fields.description: Auto order schedule, used only during inserts supplying the recurring schedule

fields.name: auto_order_last_rebill_dts
fields.description: Date/time of the last rebill, used only during order insert to help project future rebills

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: country_code_of_origin
fields.description: Country of origin (ISO-3166 two letter code)

fields.name: component_unit_value
fields.description: Value of the kit component item

fields.name: display
fields.description: True if this property is displayed to the customer

fields.name: expiration_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the property expires and is deleted

fields.name: tax_product_type
fields.description: Type of product for tax purposes (self or UltraCart Managed taxes)

fields.name: shipping_status
fields.description: Shipping status for this item.  This is the replacement for the old order level shipping status.

fields.name: item_index
fields.description: Index of the item on the order (one based index)

fields.name: parent_item_index
fields.description: If this item is a kit component, this is the item index of the parent item (kit)

fields.name: parent_merchant_item_id
fields.description: If this item is a kit component, this is the item id of the parent item (kit)

fields.name: refund_reason
fields.description: Refund reason code.  This can only be written during a refund operation otherwise this field is read only.

fields.name: return_reason
fields.description: Return reason code.  This can only be written during a refund operation otherwise this field is read only.

fields.name: actual_cogs
fields.description: Actual COGS of the item used by the cost analysis report

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

name: coupons
description: Coupons

fields.name: coupon_code
fields.description: Coupon code entered by the customer

fields.name: base_coupon_code
fields.description: Coupon code configured by the merchant.  Will differ if the customer used a one time coupon code generated off this base coupon

fields.name: accounting_code
fields.description: QuickBooks accounting code for this coupon

fields.name: automatically_applied
fields.description: Whether or not the coupon was automatically applied to the order

fields.name: hdie_from_customer
fields.description: True if this coupon is hide from the customer

name: customer_profile
description: Customer profile if one is associated with the order

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email address of this customer profile

fields.name: qb_class
fields.description: QuickBooks class to import this customer as

fields.name: qb_code
fields.description: QuickBooks name to import this customer as

fields.name: track_separately
fields.description: True if the customer should be tracked separately in QuickBooks

fields.name: tax_exempt
fields.description: True if the customer is tax exempt

fields.name: state_region
fields.description: State for United States otherwise region or province for other countries

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: state_region
fields.description: State for United States otherwise region or province for other countries

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: card_number_token
fields.description: Hosted field token for the card number

fields.name: customer_profile_credit_card_id
fields.description: ID of the stored credit card to use

fields.name: allow_purchase_order
fields.description: Allow purchase orders by this customer

fields.name: auto_approve_purchase_order
fields.description: Auto approve purchase orders by this customer

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: This customer always receives free shipping

fields.name: free_shipping_minimum
fields.description: If free_shipping is true, this is the minimum subtotal required for free shipping

fields.name: send_signup_notification
fields.description: Send signup notification, if true during customer creation, will send a notification.

fields.name: allow_selection_of_address_type
fields.description: Allow selection of residential or business address type

fields.name: no_free_shipping
fields.description: No free shipping regardless of coupons or item level settings

fields.name: referral_source
fields.description: Referral Source specified on the wholesale customer signup form.  No other meaning than that signup flow.

fields.name: automatic_merchant_notes
fields.description: Automatic merchant notes are added to every order placed

fields.name: receipt_notification
fields.description: CC this email on receipt notifications

fields.name: shipment_notification
fields.description: CC this email on shipment notifications

fields.name: refund_notification
fields.description: CC this email on refund notifications

fields.name: orders_summary
fields.description: Summary of orders placed by this customer profile

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total amount associated with the orders

fields.name: tax_codes
fields.description: Tax codes used by tax integrations

fields.name: quotes_summary
fields.description: Summary of the quotes submitted by this customer profile

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total amount associated with the quotes

fields.name: privacy
fields.description: Privacy settings of the customer profile

fields.name: preference
fields.description: The customer has opted in to preference tracking

fields.name: statistics
fields.description: The customer has opted in to statistics collection

fields.name: marketing
fields.description: The customer has opted in to marketing

fields.name: expert
fields.description: True if the customer is an expert

fields.name: auto_approve
fields.description: True if reviewes from this customer profile should automatically be approved

fields.name: average_overall_rating
fields.description: Average overall rating of items reviewed

fields.name: software_entitlements
fields.description: Software entitlements owned by this customer

fields.name: customer_software_entitlement_oid
fields.description: Customer profile software entitlement object identifier

fields.name: activation_code
fields.description: Activation Code Associated with the software

fields.name: activation_dts
fields.description: Date/time when the activation code was created

fields.name: expiration_dts
fields.description: Date/time when the activation code will expire

fields.name: purchased_via_order_id
fields.description: Order ID used to purchase this software.

fields.name: purchased_via_item_id
fields.description: Item ID used to purchase this software.

fields.name: purchased_via_item_description
fields.description: Item description used to purchase this software.

fields.name: expiration_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the property expires and is deleted

fields.name: internal_gift_certificate_balance
fields.description: Loyalty Cashback / Store credit balance (internal gift certificate balance)

fields.name: internal_gift_certificate_oid
fields.description: Internal gift certificate oid used to tracking loyalty cashback / store credit.

fields.name: loyalty_tier_oid
fields.description: Loyalty tier oid (set to zero to remove the tier)

fields.name: loyalty_tier_expiration_dts
fields.description: Loyalty tier expiration date (read only because of SDK addition)

fields.name: channel_partner_oid
fields.description: EDI channel partner this customer profile is associated with

fields.name: store_number
fields.description: The EDI store number associated with this customer profile.

fields.name: distribution_center_number
fields.description: The EDI distribution center number associated with this customer profile.

fields.name: do_not_send_mail
fields.description: Do not send mail (null will not update)

name: checkout
description: Checkout

fields.name: customer_ip_address
fields.description: IP address of the customer when placing the order

fields.name: screen_branding_theme_code
fields.description: Screen branding theme code associated with the order (legacy checkout)

fields.name: storefront_host_name
fields.description: StoreFront host name associated with the order

fields.name: upsell_path_code
fields.description: Upsell path code assigned during the checkout that the customer went through

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Comments from the customer.  Rarely used on the single page checkout.

fields.name: browser
fields.description: Parsed user agent string into components

fields.name: screen_size
fields.description: Screen size small, medium or large

name: channel_partner
description: Channel Partner if one is associated with the order

fields.name: channel_partner_oid
fields.description: Channel partner object identifier, read-only and available on existing channel orders only.

fields.name: channel_partner_order_id
fields.description: The order ID assigned by the channel partner for this order.

fields.name: channel_partner_code
fields.description: The code of the channel partner

fields.name: channel_partner_data
fields.description: Additional data provided by the channel partner, read-only

fields.name: no_realtime_payment_processing
fields.description: Indicates this order should be placed in Account Receivable for later payment processing

fields.name: skip_payment_processing
fields.description: Indicates this order was already paid for via a channel purchase and no payment collection should be attempted

fields.name: auto_approve_purchase_order
fields.description: If true, any purchase order submitted is automatically approved

fields.name: store_if_payment_declines
fields.description: If true, any failed payment will place the order in Accounts Receivable rather than rejecting it.

fields.name: treat_warnings_as_errors
fields.description: Any warnings are raised as errors and halt the import of the order

fields.name: store_completed
fields.description: Instructs UltraCart to skip shipping department and mark this order as fully complete.  This flag defaults to true.  Set this flag to false to shipped product for this order.

fields.name: ignore_invalid_shipping_method
fields.description: Set to true to ignore invalid shipping method being specified.  Only applicable on inserting orders.

name: gift_certificate
description: Gift certificate used on the order

fields.name: gift_certificate_amount
fields.description: Gift certificate amount applied to the order

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: gift_certificate_code
fields.description: Gift certificate code used on the order

name: fraud_score
description: Fraud score if checked on the order

fields.name: high_risk_country
fields.description: True if the customer is in a high risk country known for internet fraud

fields.name: distance_km
fields.description: Distance in kilometers between the IP address and the BIN

fields.name: ip_region
fields.description: State/region associated with the IP address

fields.name: ip_city
fields.description: City associated with the IP address

fields.name: ip_latitude
fields.description: Approximate latitude associated with the IP address

fields.name: ip_longitude
fields.description: Approximate longitude associated with the IP address

fields.name: ip_isp
fields.description: ISP that owns the IP address

fields.name: ip_org
fields.description: Organization that owns the IP address

fields.name: anonymous_proxy
fields.description: True if the IP address is a known anonymous proxy server

fields.name: proxy_score
fields.description: Likelihood of the IP address being a proxy server

fields.name: spam_score
fields.description: Likelihood of the email address being associated with a spammer

fields.name: transparent_proxy
fields.description: True if the IP address that placed the order is a transparent proxy server

fields.name: free_email
fields.description: True if the email address is for a free service like gmail.com

fields.name: carder_email
fields.description: True if the email address belongs to a known credit card fraudster

fields.name: bin_match
fields.description: Whether the BIN (first six digits) matched the country

fields.name: ship_forwarder
fields.description: True if the address is a known ship forwarding company

fields.name: score
fields.description: Overall score.  This is the score that is compared to see if the order is rejected or held for review by the fraud filter rules.

fields.name: customer_phone_in_billing_location
fields.description: Whether the customer's phone number is located in the area of the billing address

name: buysafe
description: buySAFE bond

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: buysafe_shopping_cart_id
fields.description: Shopping cart ID associated with the buySAFE bond

fields.name: buysafe_bond_available
fields.description: True if a buySAFE bond was available for purchase on this order

fields.name: buysafe_bond_free
fields.description: True if the buySAFE bond was free for this order

fields.name: buysafe_bond_wanted
fields.description: True if the buySAFE bond was wanted by the customer

fields.name: buysafe_bond_refunded
fields.description: Amount of the buySAFE bond that was refunded

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

name: affiliates
description: Affiliates if any were associated with the order.  The first one in the array sent the order and each subsequent affiliate is the recruiter that earns a downline commission.

fields.name: sub_id
fields.description: Sub identifier provided by the affiliate on the click that generated this order

fields.name: ledger_entries
fields.description: Ledger entries associated with all the commissions earned on this order

fields.name: transaction_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the affiliate ledger was generated for the transaction

fields.name: transaction_memo
fields.description: Details of the transaction suitable for display to the affiliate

fields.name: transaction_amount_paid
fields.description: The amount that has been paid so far on the transaction

fields.name: assigned_by_user
fields.description: UltraCart user name that assigned this commission if manually assigned

fields.name: item_id
fields.description: Item ID that this ledger record is associated with

fields.name: tier_number
fields.description: Tier number of this affiliate in the commission calculation

fields.name: transaction_percentage
fields.description: The percentage earned on the transaction

name: salesforce
description: Salesforce.com identifiers

name: linked_shipment
description: Linked shipment information (CCBill orders only)

fields.name: has_linked_shipment
fields.description: True if this order has child linked shipments

fields.name: linked_shipment
fields.description: True if this order is linked to another parent order

fields.name: linked_shipment_to_order_id
fields.description: The parent order id that this one is linked to

fields.name: linked_shipment_order_ids
fields.description: The child linked shipment order ids

fields.name: linked_shipment_channel_partner_order_ids
fields.description: The child linked shipment channel partner order ids

name: quote
description: Quote

name: auto_order
description: Auto Order.  If this is the original order then expansion can be done.  If it is a rebill then the record is a small pointer to the auto order and original order records.

fields.name: original_order_id
fields.description: The original order id that this auto order is associated with.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: True if this auto order is enabled

fields.name: auto_order_code
fields.description: Unique code assigned to this auto order

fields.name: credit_card_attempt
fields.description: The number of credit card attempts that have taken place

fields.name: next_attempt
fields.description: The next time that the auto order will be attempted for processing

fields.name: items
fields.description: The items that are setup to rebill

fields.name: next_shipment_dts
fields.description: Date/time that this item is scheduled to rebill

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: Frequency of the rebill if not a fixed schedule

fields.name: remaining_repeat_count
fields.description: The number of rebills remaining before this item is complete

fields.name: life_time_value
fields.description: The life time value of this item including the original purchase

fields.name: number_of_rebills
fields.description: The number of times this item has rebilled

fields.name: rebill_value
fields.description: The value of the rebills of this item

fields.name: last_order_dts
fields.description: Date/time of the last order of this item

fields.name: no_order_after_dts
fields.description: Date/time after which no additional rebills of this item should occur

fields.name: arbitrary_unit_cost
fields.description: Arbitrary unit cost that rebills of this item should occur at

fields.name: arbitrary_item_id
fields.description: Arbitrary item id that should be rebilled instead of the normal schedule

fields.name: arbitrary_unit_cost_remaining_orders
fields.description: The number of rebills to give the arbitrary unit cost on before reverting to normal pricing.

fields.name: original_item_id
fields.description: The original item id purchased.  This item controls scheduling.  If you wish to modify a schedule, for example, from monthly to yearly, change this item from your monthly item to your yearly item, and then change the next_shipment_dts to your desired date.

fields.name: arbitrary_schedule_days
fields.description: The number of days to rebill if the frequency is set to an arbitrary number of days

fields.name: arbitrary_percentage_discount
fields.description: An arbitrary percentage discount to provide on future rebills

fields.name: next_preshipment_notice_dts
fields.description: The date/time of when the next pre-shipment notice should be sent

fields.name: preshipment_notice_sent
fields.description: True if the preshipment notice associated with the next rebill has been sent

fields.name: paypal_recurring_payment_profile_id
fields.description: The PayPal Profile ID tied to this item

fields.name: paypal_payer_id
fields.description: The PayPal Payer ID tied to this item

fields.name: future_schedules
fields.description: The future rebill schedule for this item up to the next ten rebills

fields.name: shipment_dts
fields.description: Date/time that this item is scheduled to rebill

fields.name: unit_cost
fields.description: The unit cost of the item rebilling

fields.name: rebill_count
fields.description: The number of times this rebill represents

fields.name: simple_schedule
fields.description: If the item is configured as an automatic rebill and only has a simple single step schedule then details are provided within this object

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: Frequency of the rebill if not a fixed schedule

fields.name: repeat_count
fields.description: The number of times this simple schedule is configured for

fields.name: first_order_dts
fields.description: Date/time of the first order of this item.  Null if item added to auto order and has not been rebilled yet.

fields.name: paused
fields.description: True if paused.  This field is an object instead of a primitive for backwards compatibility.

fields.name: calculated_next_shipment_dts
fields.description: Calculated Date/time that this item is scheduled to rebill.  Will be null if no more shipments are going to occur on this item

fields.name: add_ons
fields.description: Array of addon objects instructing which items to add to auto order and how many times they should be added.

fields.name: canceled_by_user
fields.description: The user that canceled the auto order

fields.name: canceled_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the auto order was canceled

fields.name: cancel_after_next_x_orders
fields.description: Cancel this auto order after X additional rebills

fields.name: rotating_transaction_gateway_code
fields.description: The RTG code associated with this order for future rebills

fields.name: failure_reason
fields.description: The reason this auto order failed during the last rebill attempt

fields.name: cancel_upgrade
fields.description: True if the auto order was canceled because the customer purchased an upgrade item

fields.name: cancel_downgrade
fields.description: True if the auto order was canceled because the customer purchased a downgrade item

fields.name: disabled_dts
fields.description: The date/time the auto order was disabled due to failed rebills

fields.name: override_affiliate_id
fields.description: Override the affiliate id given credit for rebills of this auto order

fields.name: completed
fields.description: True if the auto order ran successfully to completion

fields.name: status
fields.description: The status of the auto order

fields.name: cancel_reason
fields.description: The reason this auto order was canceled by either merchant or customer

name: properties
description: Properties, available only through update, not through insert due to the nature of how properties are handled internally

fields.name: display
fields.description: True if this property is displayed to the customer

fields.name: expiration_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the property expires and is deleted

fields.name: created_dts
fields.description: The date/time that the property was created by the user

name: Tags
description: tags, available only through update, not through insert due to the nature of how tags are handled internally

name: point_of_sale
description: If the order was a point of sale order, this this object contains the details of where the transaction took place.

fields.name: location
fields.description: The location that the point of sale transaction took place at.

fields.name: pos_location_oid
fields.description: Object identifier of the point of sale location.

fields.name: merchant_id
fields.description: Merchant ID that owns this location

fields.name: distribution_center_code
fields.description: The distribution center code where inventory is reduced from for this sale.

fields.name: external_id
fields.description: External Id useful for syncing with a remote filesystem, this may be an MD5 hash or whatever suits your needs.

fields.name: tax_county
fields.description: Tax county associated with this address.  Need when a self managed tax configuration is being used.

fields.name: register
fields.description: The register that the point of sale transaction took place at.

fields.name: pos_register_oid
fields.description: Object identifier of the point of sale register.

fields.name: merchant_id
fields.description: The merchant id that owns this point of sale register.

fields.name: pos_location_oid
fields.description: Object identifier of the point of sale location where this register is located.

fields.name: reader
fields.description: The card reader that the point of sale transaction took place at if a credit card was used.

fields.name: pos_reader_id
fields.description: Object identifier of the point of sale reader.

fields.name: merchant_id
fields.description: The merchant id that owns this point of sale reader.

fields.name: serial_number
fields.description: The serial number of the reader.

fields.name: device_type
fields.description: The device type of the reader.

fields.name: pos_register_oid
fields.description: Object identifier of the point of sale register this reader is assigned to.

fields.name: payment_provider
fields.description: The payment provider for the card reader.

fields.name: stripe_account_id
fields.description: If the payment provider is Stripe, this is the Stripe account id

fields.name: stripe_reader_id
fields.description: If the payment provide is Stripe, this is the Stripe terminal reader id

name: utms
description: UTM clicks.  The zero index is the most recent (last) UTM click

name: refund_reason
description: Refund reason code.  This can only be written during a refund operation otherwise this field is read only.

name: reject_reason
description: Reject reason code.  This can only be written during a reject operation otherwise this field is read only.

name: current_stage_histories
description: History of the changes to the current_stage field

fields.name: before_stage
fields.description: Previous stage that the order was in.

fields.name: after_stage
fields.description: New stage that the order is in.
